Ěेͩफक कंĚोल Ǿम (Ǒदãलȣ पͧलसु ), मालवीय नगर, नई Ǒदãलȣ; 5. जवाहर लाल नेहǽ èटेͫडयम , लोधी रोड, नई Ǒदãलȣ; 6. गेàस ऑपरेसन सटर Ʌ , जंतर मंतर, नई Ǒदãलȣ; 7. केटस लोकल कंĚोल ǽम, èवाèØय एवं पǐरवार कãयाण ͪ वभाग , बेला रोड, नई Ǒदãलȣ । [फा. सं. 6(6)/2010 - सीएल. एफ. एÖड ई] एन. रͪव शंकर, संयु सͬचव G.S.R. 630(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 70 of the Information Technology Act, 2000 (21 of 2000), the Central Government hereby declares the TETRA Secured Communication System Network, its hardware and software installed at— 1. Operation and Control Centre, Vikas Bhawan-II, Civil Lines, New Delhi; 2. Back-up Operation and Control Centre, Police Hq, ITO, New Delhi; 3. Security Lines (Delhi Police), Malviya Nagar, New Delhi; 4. Traffic Control Room (Delhi Police), Vinay Marg, New Delhi; 5. Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium, Lodi Road, New Delhi; 6. Games Operation Centre, Jantar Mantar,New Delhi 7. CATS Local Control Room, Department of Health and Family Welfare, Bela Road, New Delhi to be protected system for the purposes of the Information Technology Act, 2000. [F.No. 6(6)/2009-CLF&E] N. RAVI SHANKAR, Jt. Secy. -- 1 of 2 -- Government of India MINISTRY OF COMMUNICATIONS AND INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (Department of Information Technology) ORDER New Delhi, the 4th August 2010 No. 6(6)/2010-CLF&E.— Whereas under the notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Communications and Information Technology (Department of Information Technology) vide No. G.S.R. 630(E) dated 26 th July 2010 issued under sub-section (1) of section 70 of the Information Technology Act, 2000 (21 of 2000), (herein referred to as "the said Act"), the Central Government has declared the TETRA Secured Communication System Network, its hardware and software to be a protected system; And whereas it is necessary to authorize certain persons under sub-section (2) of section 70 of the said Act to access protected systems notified under the said notification; Now, therefore, in pursuance of sub-section (2) of section 70 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby authorizes the persons mentioned in the Schedule given below to access the protected system. SCHEDULE 1. Officers to be designated by the Central Government 2. Officers to be designated by the Government of NCT of Delhi 3. Officers to be designated by M/S HCL Infosystems Limited 4. Officers to be designated by M/S Motorola India Private Limited 5. Officers to be designated by M/S Telecommunication Consultants India Limited. [No. 6(6)/2010-CLF&E] (Gulshan Ral) Group Coordinator, Cyberlaw -- 2 of 2 --
